hero.desc: An atomic, ultra-fast, visually spectacular launcher. Native support for Microsoft accounts and Fabric mods integrated directly into the main menu.
hero.ticker_2: // PLAY WITH FRIENDS // EXPLORE NEW WORLDS
hero.ticker_3: +++ SECURE YOUR ACCOUNT +++ FAST UPDATES +++ MOD SUPPORT

features.title: Designed for the Future
features.subtitle: It's not just a launcher, it's an extension of your gaming experience.
features.f1_desc: Ultra-fast Glassmorphism interface with fluid, reactive animations.
features.f2_desc: Native and ultra-secure support using MSMC for official Microsoft accounts.
features.f3_desc: Completely reimagined Java main menu showcasing your 3D skin.
features.f4_desc: Optimized with Electron, Vite, and React to consume minimal RAM.

download.title: Cross-Platform
download.subtitle: Download the official version for your operating system and start enjoying an unprecedented gaming experience.

footer.rights: © 2026 Slaumcher. Not associated with Mojang or Microsoft.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: At Slaumcher we take your privacy seriously. We do not collect telemetry, we do not sell your data, and we do not track your gaming sessions.
privacy.p2: Your Microsoft tokens are stored exclusively in an encrypted SQLite database locally on your own machine.
privacy.p3: If you have questions about how we handle information, you can review the open source code in our repository.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.p1: The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. Slaumcher is not an official product of Minecraft or Mojang Studios.
terms.p2: Using this launcher requires a legitimate (Premium) copy of Minecraft associated with a valid Microsoft account.
terms.p3: By downloading this software, you agree to our open source MIT license.
